_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card With Lines Patter
_meta.description:
A modern card component featuring a diagonal lines pattern. The pattern creates a dynamic visual texture through intersecting diagonal lines, perfect for creating a sense of movement and sophistication in your UI.

Features
- Diagonal lines pattern with consistent spacing
- Clean, minimalist aesthetic
- Dark/Light mode support
- Smooth gradient overlay
- Responsive design
- Built with shadcn/ui theme system
- Framer Motion entrance animation
